metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skill library — specialized workflows for Python development, debugging, code review, LLM engineering, and more.

plugins.name: all
plugins.description: All skills bundled together — code review, codebase research, code explanation, LLM dev, Playwright, Python dev, debugging, task handover, and test writing.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Reviews code changes for quality, correctness, and adherence to project conventions before commits or PRs.

plugins.name: codebase-research
plugins.description: Navigate, search, and map codebases efficiently to answer structural and locational questions.

plugins.name: explain-code
plugins.description: Explains code with analogies, diagrams, and step-by-step walkthroughs.

plugins.name: llm-dev
plugins.description: Expert guidance for LLM development — architectures, training, inference, RAG systems, agentic workflows, evals, and production applications.

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Automate browser interactions, test web pages, and work with Playwright tests.

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Expert Python development workflow biased toward simplicity and surgical changes. Uses Python 3.13+, ruff, pyright, pytest, pyproject.toml.

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Language-agnostic four-phase debugging methodology with root cause analysis. No fixes without root cause first.

plugins.name: task-handover
plugins.description: Create a structured handover document so the next agent or engineer can resume work with zero prior context.

plugins.name: write-tests
plugins.description: Write focused pytest tests covering critical paths, edge cases, and error handling.
